determinism_note: This file intentionally contains no timestamp; SHA-256 is a function only of the registered inputs.
physics_status: Leading-order line-of-sight Chern-Simons rotation. The g_CS amplitude is a parametric placeholder for the FRG-derived σ-F̃F coupling f_σ; Paper B FRG calculation is gating piece for narrowing g_CS to a specific predicted value.
title: CMB cosmic birefringence from σ-F̃F coupling
